languages.text: "Сейчас же начну реорганизовывать оборону согласно святым писаниям "Тактики Империалис".
"I will commence the reorganisation of our defences immediately, following the sacred tenets of the Tactica Imperialis."
languages.original_text: "Сейчас же начну реорганизовывать оборону согласно святым писаниям "Тактики Империалис".

traits.locale_text: "I will commence the reorganisation of our defences immediately, following the sacred tenets of the Tactica Imperialis."
"I will commence the reorganisation of our defences immediately, following the sacred tenets of the Tactica Imperialis."

languages.text: “我这就遵循《帝国战术指南》里的神圣教义，重新部署我们的防线。”
languages.original_text: "I will commence the reorganisation of our defences immediately, following the sacred tenets of the Tactica Imperialis."

traits.locale_text: “我这就遵循《帝国战术指南》里的神圣教义，重新部署我们的防线。”

languages.text: "Tactica İmperialis'in kutsal ilkelerini izleyerek savunmamızı derhâl yeniden düzenleyeceğim."
languages.original_text: "I will commence the reorganisation of our defences immediately, following the sacred tenets of the Tactica Imperialis."

traits.locale_text: "Tactica İmperialis'in kutsal ilkelerini izleyerek savunmamızı derhâl yeniden düzenleyeceğim."

languages.text: « Je vais tout de suite commencer à réorganiser nos défenses, conformément aux préceptes sacrés de la Tactica Imperialis. »
languages.original_text: "I will commence the reorganisation of our defences immediately, following the sacred tenets of the Tactica Imperialis."

traits.locale_text: « Je vais tout de suite commencer à réorganiser nos défenses, conformément aux préceptes sacrés de la Tactica Imperialis. »

languages.text: «Daré comienzo a la reorganización de nuestras defensas de inmediato, de acuerdo con los principios sagrados del Tactica Imperialis».
languages.original_text: "I will commence the reorganisation of our defences immediately, following the sacred tenets of the Tactica Imperialis."

traits.locale_text: «Daré comienzo a la reorganización de nuestras defensas de inmediato, de acuerdo con los principios sagrados del Tactica Imperialis».

languages.text: "Ich werde unsere Verteidigung gemäß der heiligen Grundsätze des Tactica Imperialis umgehend neu organisieren."
languages.original_text: "I will commence the reorganisation of our defences immediately, following the sacred tenets of the Tactica Imperialis."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde unsere Verteidigung gemäß der heiligen Grundsätze des Tactica Imperialis umgehend neu organisieren."

languages.text: 「直ちに、タクティカ・インペリアリスの神聖な教義に従い、我々の防御の再編成に取りかかります」
languages.original_text: "I will commence the reorganisation of our defences immediately, following the sacred tenets of the Tactica Imperialis."

traits.locale_text: 「直ちに、タクティカ・インペリアリスの神聖な教義に従い、我々の防御の再編成に取りかかります」
